sentences.target: Die vordere Tür klemmt schon wieder.

translations.de: Die vordere Tür klemmt schon wieder.
translations.en: The front door is stuck again.
translations.es: La puerta de entrada está atascada otra vez.
translations.fr: La porte d’entrée est encore coincée.
translations.it: La porta d’ingresso è di nuovo bloccata.
translations.pt: A porta da frente está emperrada de novo.
translations.hi: मुख्य दरवाज़ा फिर से अटका हुआ है.
translations.ro: Ușa de la intrare s-a blocat din nou.
translations.ja: 玄関のドアがまた開かない。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; feminine singular nominative; determiner of the subject NP 'vordere Tür'.
Attributive adjective; weak inflection due to definite article; feminine nominative singular; modifies 'Tür'.
Common noun; feminine; head of the subject NP in nominative singular.
Finite lexical verb; 3rd person singular present indicative; predicate of the clause.
Adverb; forms the fixed collocation 'schon wieder' conveying 'again' (often with nuance of annoyance).
Adverb; together with 'schon' forms 'schon wieder' meaning 'again'; modifies the verb phrase.

sentences.target: Wir sitzen heute in der vorderen Reihe.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈzɪtsn̩ ˈhɔʏtə ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈfɔʁdərən ˈʁaɪ̯ə/

translations.de: Wir sitzen heute in der vorderen Reihe.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈzɪtsn̩ ˈhɔʏtə ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈfɔʁdərən ˈʁaɪ̯ə/
translations.en: We are sitting in the front row today.
translations.es: Hoy nos sentamos en la primera fila.
translations.fr: Aujourd’hui, on est au premier rang.
translations.ru: Сегодня мы сидим в первом ряду.
translations.vi: Hôm nay bọn mình ngồi hàng ghế đầu.
translations.nl: Vandaag zitten we op de erste rij.
translations.uk: Сьогодні ми сидимо в першому ряду.
translations.hi: आज हम सबसे आगे वाली पंक्ति में बैठे हैं.
translations.nb: I dag sitter vi på første rad.
translations.id: Hari ini kita duduk di baris paling depan.
translations.sv: Idag sitter vi på första raden.
translations.da: I dag sidder vi på første række.
translations.ja: 今日は一番前の列に座っている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite lexical verb; 1st person plural present indicative; main predicate.
Temporal adverb; sets the time frame of the action.
Preposition selecting dative for static location; heads the PP 'in der vorderen Reihe'.
Definite article; feminine singular dative; determiner of 'vorderen Reihe' (object of 'in').
Attributive adjective; weak inflection; feminine dative singular; modifies 'Reihe'.
Common noun; feminine; head of PP complement; object of the preposition 'in' (dative).

sentences.target: Ich stelle den Rucksack auf den vorderen Sitz.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈʃtɛlə deːn ˈʁʊksak aʊ̯f deːn ˈfɔʁdərən zɪts/

translations.de: Ich stelle den Rucksack auf den vorderen Sitz.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈʃtɛlə deːn ˈʁʊksak aʊ̯f deːn ˈfɔʁdərən zɪts/
translations.en: I put the backpack on the front seat.
translations.es: Pongo la mochila en el asiento delantero.
translations.fr: Je pose le sac à dos sur le siège avant.
translations.it: Metto lo zaino sul sedile anteriore.
translations.zh-Hans: 我把背包放在前排座位上。
translations.ru: Я кладу рюкзак на переднее сиденье.
translations.pt: Eu coloco a mochila no banco da frente.
translations.he: אני שם את התרמיל על המושב הקדמי.
translations.vi: Tôi đặt balo lên ghế trước.
translations.ar: أضع حقيبة الظهر على المقعد الأمامي.
translations.nl: Ik zet de rugzak op de voorstoel.
translations.uk: Я кладу рюкзак на переднє сидіння.
translations.hu: A hátizsákot az első ülésre teszem.
translations.hi: मैं बैग को आगे वाली सीट पर रख रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Βάζω το σακίδιο στο μπροστινό κάθισμα.
translations.id: Aku menaruh ransel di kursi depan.
translations.ro: Pun rucsacul pe scaunul din față.
translations.ja: リュックを助手席に置く。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite lexical verb; 1st person singular present indicative; transitive predicate indicating placement.
Definite article; masculine singular accusative; determiner of 'Rucksack' (direct object).
Common noun; masculine; direct object (theme) undergoing placement.
Two-way preposition; takes accusative here indicating direction/motion towards a surface; heads the PP.
Definite article; masculine singular accusative; determiner of 'vorderen Sitz' (object of 'auf').
Attributive adjective; weak inflection; masculine accusative singular; modifies 'Sitz'.
Common noun; masculine; object of the preposition 'auf' (goal of motion).

sentences.target: Das vordere Rad wackelt beim Fahren.

translations.de: Das vordere Rad wackelt beim Fahren.
translations.en: The front wheel wobbles while driving.
translations.es: La rueda delantera se tambalea cuando voy en bici.
translations.fr: La roue avant tremble quand je roule.
translations.it: La ruota anteriore oscilla mentre pedalo.
translations.yue: 騎單車嗰陣前轆會搖晃。
translations.ru: Переднее колесо шатается во время езды.
translations.pt: A roda dianteira balança enquanto eu pedalo.
translations.vi: Bánh trước bị lắc khi đạp xe.
translations.nl: Het voorwiel wiebelt tijdens het fietsen.
translations.uk: Переднє колесо хитається під час їзди.
translations.hu: Az első kerék menet közben imbolyog.
translations.hi: चलाते समय आगे वाला पहिया डगमगाता है.
translations.pl: Przednie koło chwieje się podczas jazdy.
translations.el: Η μπροστινή ρόδα κουνιέται όταν οδηγώ.
translations.id: Roda depan goyang saat saya bersepeda.
translations.ro: Roata din față se clatină când merg me bicicleta.
translations.cs: Přední kolo se při jízdě viklá.
translations.ja: 走行中に前輪がふらつく。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; neuter singular nominative; determiner of the subject NP 'vordere Rad'.
Attributive adjective; weak inflection; neuter nominative singular; modifies 'Rad'.
Common noun; neuter; head of the subject NP.
Finite lexical verb; 3rd person singular present indicative; intransitive predicate.
Preposition (contraction of 'bei dem'); selects dative; heads the PP 'beim Fahren'.
Nominalized verb (gerund-like noun); dative singular as object of 'bei'.
